executives.name: Michael Parrett
executives.background: Mr. Parrett is the Chair of the Board. He is a corporate director and was formerly the President and CEO of Billiton Metals Canada Inc.

executives.name: Mick McMullen
executives.background: Mr. McMullen is a mining professional with over 25 years of experience. He was previously the CEO and President of Detour Gold Corporation and CEO of Stillwater Mining Company.

executives.name: Peter O'Hagan
executives.background: Mr. O'Hagan has over 30 years of experience in commodities and structured finance, including roles at Goldman Sachs and Trafigura.
